title: The phantom dragon of allay
description: the resource pack replaces allay and Vex with dragons
body:
![The phantom dragon of allay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f03015e41a9b444dd9da5a99ebe1b04916158bf7_0.webp)

![the strip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cb24af972c703b54f4f1d0ac6f34096e57fc316.png) **in the resource pack, allay and vex are replaced with cute dragons, and he changes their textures and models**
![poloska](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb5a23d9aa754e615f86d589eabaa7b45adfb964.png)
![snac](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e04e89260b8b6a17f20a2a80493dfb3a81169b1.png) **what's he doing!**
- replaces all textures and models of allay
- replaces all vex textures and models
- changes the texture of their egg spawn

![heh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fcb388e192264a955a6b0eb6d8a82a39b8a34ea.png)  **Important note**

to work, you need OptiFine

![poloska red](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbfe25557393799a58b6587cede25b2183f5a5c5.png)
![the strip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0076017f3f98f4a5045a198ed3fb213ab7d60ca8.png)
